title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 249.485 - Sewer district to be separate entity not part of county commission, exception
text:
249.485.  Sewer district to be separate entity not part of county commission, exception. — A sewer district created under sections 249.430 to 249.667 is to be considered an entity separate from the county commission, and is not governed by the administrative or procedural requirements of county commissions unless specified otherwise in sections 249.430 to 249.667.
(L. 1983 H.B. 371)
